title: Another Internal Error: sameHash function undefined (returns 0) for node under CFunc.

features.name: case statement item with sized cast literal
features.description: Code should include a case statement with a case item that uses a sized cast literal syntax '<size>()' (cast with size but no value)
features.snippet:
case (1'b1)
  7'(): ; // sized cast with empty parens triggers bug
  default: ;
endcase
